raw_judges: jury body selects outstanding works from commercially available products and completed spatial or integrated design projects to receive the "Golden Pin Design Mark," recognizing their design quality a
raw_criteria: selection process to encourage manufacturers to develop and design new products
selection process to involve the public in the movement to recognize and appreciate good product design
selection process followed by an open voting and discussions by a panel of experts in a campaign to turn the Golden Pin into a world-class design award
selection, where jurors evaluate and rate each entry individually based on the selection criteria, allowing participants to better understand how their product compares to others

ABOUT
Award Introduction
First established in Taiwan in 1981, the Golden Pin Design Award (GPDA) is now one of the most representative and influential design awards in the global Hua-ren market. Since 2014, GPDA opened its application to designs of the world, becoming an international award with the mission of elevating dome
